hooks.command: f=$(python -c "import sys,json,pathlib;print(pathlib.PureWindowsPath(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')).as_posix())"); case "$f" in */dist/*|*/build/*|*/dist_installer/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Cartella generata da PyInstaller: non modificare dist/, build/ o dist_installer/."}}';; esac

f=$(python -c "import sys,json,pathlib;print(pathlib.PureWindowsPath(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')).as_posix())"); case "$f" in */app/*.py|*/tests/*.py) out=$(python -m pytest -q 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
